<!--
Explain why the change is needed and any behavior or compatibility detail
that is not obvious from the title and diff. Routine changes usually need no
more than one paragraph; leave the body empty if the title and diff are enough.

Link the relevant issue when one exists. Use `Closes #N` only when this PR
finishes it. For an intermediate slice, use `Refs #N` or say that the issue
remains open; avoid negated closing phrases.

Do not paste internal specifications, work logs, command transcripts, or
checklists. Mention a physical-Metal result only when it matters and is not
visible in CI.
-->
